name: Micro-Quick Quesadilla
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a tortilla on a clean surface.
2. Add shredded cheese and chili sauce to one half of the tortilla.
3. Fold the tortilla in half over the ingredients.
4. Heat a skillet over medium heat.
5. Cook the quesadilla for about 2-3 minutes per side, until golden brown and crispy.
6. Turn off the heat.
7. Cut into wedges and serve hot.
